description: PR3 scenario #5 — locks beat warm-start. A section is pinned by PR1 lock to slot A; the baseline for the same section asks for slot B. Warm-start must NOT try to retain the baseline — the lock wins, LOCK_VIOLATION appears as the rejection reason recorded against the baseline in the trace, and the section ends at slot A.
notes: Priority order for the final chosen slot: (1) PR1 locks, (2) PR3 warm-start retention, (3) cold-start scoring.
